name: reviewgate
description: Independent code-review control loop for Claude Code and Codex — verifies diffs, requires explicit finding outcomes, and records honest defer/escalation states.
author: Markus Wiesecke (https://github.com/Codevena)

scripts.build: bun build src/cli/index.ts --compile --outfile dist/reviewgate && mkdir -p dist/grammars dist/bin-templates && cp node_modules/web-tree-sitter/web-tree-sitter.wasm node_modules/tree-sitter-typescript/*.wasm node_modules/tree-sitter-python/*.wasm dist/grammars/ && { cp bin-templates/*.sh dist/bin-templates/ 2>/dev/null || true; } && { cp -r src/personas dist/personas 2>/dev/null || true; }
scripts.self-review: bun run dev init && bun run dev gate --hook trigger </dev/null && bun run dev gate --hook stop </dev/null
